title: Leads
summary: Your natural leadership capability allows you to command others, including a loyal band of followers.
tiers: Tier 3: Advanced Command or Expert Follower
Tier 6: Band of Followers or Mind of a Leader
gm_intrusions: Followers fail, betray, lie, become corrupted, get kidnapped, or die.
text: Your natural leadership capability allows you to command others, including a loyal band of followers.
